title: pimelea stricta
intro: Pimelea stricta, also known as sticky pimelea, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Thymelaeaceae family. The leaves and stems of Pimelea stricta have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Pimelea stricta is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil for herbal remedies, and it is also used in some skincare products to take advantage of its antiseptic and soothing properties.
